message: Improve publish verification and npm duplicate handling

files.patch:
@@ -23,4 +23,20 @@ jobs:
           node-version: "24"
           registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
 
-      - run: npm publish
+      - name: Publish to npm
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          name="$(node -p "require('./package.json').name")"
+          version="$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
+
+          if npm publish; then
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
+          if npm view "${name}@${version}" version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+            echo "::notice::${name}@${version} is already published; skipping npm publish."
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
+          echo "::error::npm publish failed for ${name}@${version}, and that version is not available on npm."
+          exit 1

@@ -74,6 +74,11 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
+      - name: Set up Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: "3.12"
+
       - name: Install uv
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
 
@@ -110,7 +115,7 @@ jobs:
         env:
           EXPECTED_VERSION: ${{ steps.expected-version.outputs.expected_version }}
         run: |
-          installed_version="$(uvx --no-cache "tenzir-ship==$EXPECTED_VERSION" --version | tr -d '\r')"
+          installed_version="$(uvx --python 3.12 --no-cache "tenzir-ship==$EXPECTED_VERSION" --version | tr -d '\r')"
           if [ "$installed_version" != "$EXPECTED_VERSION" ]; then
             echo "Expected version $EXPECTED_VERSION but received $installed_version." >&2
             exit 1
